  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Description copied from class: Sequent
      Checks whether this sequent contains any formulas.
      Overrides:
      isEmpty in class Sequent
      Returns:
      true if the sequent is empty, false otherwise

    • iterator

      public @NonNull Iterator<SequentFormula> iterator()
      Description copied from class: Sequent
      Creates an iterator to traverse all SequentFormula objects in this sequent. The iterator traverses the antecedent first, followed by the succedent.
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<SequentFormula>
      Overrides:
      iterator in class Sequent
      Returns:
      an iterator over the formulas in this sequent
